name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Bill Hagerty is our MAGA candidate of the week
body:
Bill Hagerty stood with President Trump and now we're standing with him.
Peter,Bill Hagerty is the proven Trump conservative in Tennessee's U.S. Senate Primary and I'm excited to announce he's our MAGA Candidate of the Week!For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary tells you all you need to know about the man.Let's make sure to get this man to the United States Senate! [**Find your early voting location and vote for Bill.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-y/) [FIND YOUR EARLY VOTING LOCATION](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-j/) My father trusts him. He believes in him. He needs people like Bill Hagerty to be in there and support him.I hope you'll stand with the Trump family and vote early for Bill today! [**Find your polling location.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-t/) Thank you for your time,Donald Trump Jr. | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddiduy-fuutjhhtj-o/)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Are you free this Friday, Peter?
body:
I'm very glad to announce that I'll be joining my friend Joe Biden for a virtual grassroots fundraiser this Friday, July 31, at 7:30 pm eastern! |
---
Peter --

Beating Donald Trump and Republicans up and down the ballot is going to be an uphill fight for each of these next 99 days, but I'm ready to run up that hill, and so is Joe --- and Peter, I hope you are, too.

This is our moment. Our moment to restore the soul of our nation. Our moment to build back our economy and our government better than ever before.

But we can only make the change our country desperately needs if we fight for it, together. We need you in this fight, Peter. **That 's why I'm very glad to announce that I'll be joining my friend Joe Biden for a virtual grassroots fundraiser this Friday, July 31, at 7:30 pm eastern!**

[We'll be answering your questions and talking with grassroots supporters like you, Peter. So I hope you'll chip in whatever you can today as your RSVP to this exciting event.](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.27_B3_EW-GRFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.27_B3_EW-GRFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| [$100 ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.27_B3_EW-GRFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.27_B3_EW-GRFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full&express_lane=true")

---
Peter, this country can't afford four more years of Donald Trump's failed leadership. And once we beat him and Republicans across the country in November, we're going to have to rebuild so many parts of our country, and we'll have to build them back better than they were before.

But understand this: we can't win in November without a grassroots movement. That's why grassroots fundraisers like this are critical, and why I'm honored to speak with Joe, you, and so many other people who are a part of this grassroots campaign.

So, Peter, can you chip in today and RSVP to Friday's grassroots fundraiser? There is so much at stake -- and whatever you are able to contribute today will make a powerfully important difference in November.

**Peter, will you make your first donation today and reserve your spot at my grassroots fundraiser with Joe?**

[https://go.joebiden.com/Elizabeth-Warren-Grassroots-Fundraiser](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.27_B3_EW-GRFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.27_B3_EW-GRFR_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff7d/354133497/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff7c/354133497/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff7b/354133497/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff7a/354133497/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff79/354133497/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff78/354133497/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff77/354133497/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b952/1cd0ac28/176910fcb/357dff78/354133497/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: It's time to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
First Name%%,

This November will be one of the most pivotal elections in recent memory. It’s hard to believe that the election is already less than 100 days away! There is too much at stake to take it easy this year. We need your help to stop Chuck Schumer and his cronies from enacting their radical agenda! http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNTUwODkS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMjE0NDcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Democrats are determined to defeat President Trump and steal the Senate Majority from Republicans. They already have their sights set on many battleground states across the country, and Georgia is no exception.

Peter, Senator Kelly Loeffler is one of President Trump’s most vocal allies. That’s why Chuck Schumer and liberal dark-money groups have targeted her seat. We need YOUR help. It’s up to us to hold our Republican majority in November. We cannot let Democrats win – PLEASE chip in $10, $25, $50, or more to defend our Majority >> http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNTUwODkS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMjE0NDcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Democrats only need to flip FOUR SEATS to steal the Majority. Without a win in Georgia, our Senate Majority is in SERIOUS jeopardy. As a dedicated supporter, we know you’ll step up when we need you most.

If you’re committed to preserving our Senate Majority, we need you to chip in anything you can right now to help Senator Loeffler KEEP Georgia. Will you do that, Peter? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMwNTUwODkS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgwMjE0NDcwOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you for your support,

Mitch McConnell

Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Bill Clifford is Lying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Honestly I’m at a loss for words.

Bill Clifford has lied about where I live and raise my family – we’ve lived in Salina for over a decade. He’s lied to people about my pro-life stance - I've been fighting for the pro-life cause my whole life. He has lied about the conservative record that Governor Colyer and I had during our short time in office - we were fiscally conservative, did not raise taxes, and signed important pro-life legislation.

Now he is telling folks that I am a RINO – a Republican in Name Only. If it wasn't so absurd it would be funny.
---
|
---
| Why is he telling these lies? Because he can’t talk about his own record and hopes that Kansans don’t find out about it.

Let’s go over his record for a moment (and fact check any of these points):

1\. Voted to raise property taxes multiple times

2\. Voted to keep Finney County shutdown, long after Gov. Kelly opened it back up.

3\. Supported amnesty for illegal immigrants

4\. Up until this year, Bill proudly described himself as a moderate Republican

He has now put in more than $700,000 of his own money into this race to tell these lies.

Listen, I know campaigns these days are tough and that people are willing to do and say anything to win. As you know, that’s not my style or who I am. Audrey and I live our lives and are raising our kids to live with honesty and integrity. We aren’t going to compromise our values for a seat in Congress.

[We are going to set the record straight and we are going to make sure folks know the choices between the two candidates. And I need your help to get the word out. Will you consider sending in your most generous contribution today? Will you consider making a positive post on Facebook? Maybe write a letter to the editor?](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=02a6affff3&e=a9d1410029)

We are making our final media and mail decisions this week and we need your help to match Bill’s outrageous, self-funded lies.

Thank you again. We are sprinting to the finish and feel confident in the race. With your help we are going to have a great election victory next Tuesday.

Yours in the fight.
Tracey
---

subject: Ted Cruz has taken an interest in this Senate race

body:

name: Maya Sethi
subject: The truth always prevails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdkiktt-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

I have to say, I was pretty stunned when I saw Ambassador Hagerty trying to smear my husband.

As background: some friends called 12 years ago and asked me for a political donation. I sent $50. Yep, $50 to someone from grad school. I made the donation and never thought about it again. But because I used our family credit card - which was in Manny’s name - Bill Hagerty is now trying to use this as evidence of being pro abortion, funding Black Lives Matter, and supporting ObamaCare. It’s so dishonest.

**Friend, as a general matter, I am not very political. I’m also a very private person, and never wanted to be in the spotlight. But I felt these mistruths needed to be addressed.** [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdkiktt-olhhkyhhid-j/) [WATCH ME HIT BACK IN OUR NEW AD](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdkiktt-olhhkyhhid-t/) In these final weeks of the primary, we’ve been alarmed at the sheer amount of falsehoods being thrown our way by the Ambassador. Like Manny has said, all we can do is tell the truth in response to these smear tactics.That’s what I’m trying to do in this ad. I have confidence that Tennesseans will see these tactics for what they are.

We’ve been amazed and touched by how conservatives across Tennessee have rallied behind Manny’s campaign.

I’ve known Manny since we were both 16 years old, and he’s been a fighter his whole life: for me, for our family, and for his patients. Please know that when he is elected, he’ll continue fighting for Tennesseans in every breath he takes.

Thank you for supporting my husband throughout this campaign. Your prayers and support have propelled us to this point, and we truly appreciate your support.

Sincerely,
Maya Sethi Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| | [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdkiktt-olhhkyhhid-i/)

We’re partnering with the College Dems of Indiana to launch an unprecedented voter outreach program: the Young Voters Project. | | | |

clean_body: We’re partnering with the College Dems of Indiana to launch an unprecedented voter outreach program: the Young Voters Project. | | | | ---|--- | | = This year, young people make up one of the largest voting blocs in the U.S., with one in ten eligible voters being 18-23 years old. = We’re partnering with the College Dems of Indiana to launch an unprecedented voter outreach program: the Young Voters Project. The YVP is a three-pronged plan to provide voter registration trainings for the College Dems, register young Hoosier voters, and carry out a voter outreach program to get college-aged Dems voting in November. = It’s going to take resources to get this done at universities across the state. So, we’ve set a goal to raise $30,000 by the end of the week. Unlike our dark-money-backed counterparts, our initiatives are 100% grassroots-funded. That means we’re relying on donors like you to help us make sure young Dems have the tools to vote this year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = = | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Four Things You Can Do To Help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18431905/228547787/-276570889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmVkMzQwNi1kMWQwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nEcgTCrKS-E6qYyiD4qsxLTr4JD_7cA_ofmZd9CbBPc=&emci=e665ce34-c9d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=72ed3406-d1d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10438639) _Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. [**Chip in to his campaign here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18431906/228547788/1282771135?refcode=07282020_em_su_tk_b1_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmVkMzQwNi1kMWQwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nEcgTCrKS-E6qYyiD4qsxLTr4JD_7cA_ofmZd9CbBPc=)_
* * *
---
Dear Friend, We're 14 weeks away from election day! We need all hands on deck going into November, when the voters of Central Texas will have an opportunity to send a seismic political message to the rest of the country and say we're done with the status-quo. We've had enough! This campaign is for all of you. For those who feel we need a fresh voice in Washington. For those who have felt disenfranchised. For those of you who, like myself, are outraged by our nation's patchwork, politicized response to the pandemic and are nervous about sending our kids back to school in this environment. Here are four things you can do to help: **Pledge to vote:** Your vote matters and your opinion matters to me. I want to earn your vote. I know there are people out there who are looking towards a different future, especially one with competent leadership. I am more than confident that I will be a strong, independent voice for us and take the lead for Central Texas. Please [visit with me during my virtual office hours](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18431907/228547789/-1399536464?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmVkMzQwNi1kMWQwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nEcgTCrKS-E6qYyiD4qsxLTr4JD_7cA_ofmZd9CbBPc=&emci=e665ce34-c9d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=72ed3406-d1d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=10438639), message me on Facebook, or attend a virtual event in the coming weeks. Forward this email to friends, like and share posts on social media to amplify our message. **Donate:** To reach each and every one of our neighbors, this campaign needs you to donate. clean_body: | Rick Kennedy (D-Central Texas) is the Democratic nominee for Congress in the 17th District. = Dear Friend, We're 14 weeks away from election day! We need all hands on deck going into November, when the voters of Central Texas will have an opportunity to send a seismic political message to the rest of the country and say we're done with the status-quo. We've had enough! This campaign is for all of you. For those who feel we need a fresh voice in Washington. For those who have felt disenfranchised. For those of you who, like myself, are outraged by our nation's patchwork, politicized response to the pandemic and are nervous about sending our kids back to school in this environment. Here are four things you can do to help: Pledge to vote: Your vote matters and your opinion matters to me. I want to earn your vote. I know there are people out there who are looking towards a different future, especially one with competent leadership. I am more than confident that I will be a strong, independent voice for us and take the lead for Central Texas. Please , message me on Facebook, or attend a virtual event in the coming weeks. Forward this email to friends, like and share posts on social media to amplify our message. Donate: To reach each and every one of our neighbors, this campaign needs you to donate. = I firmly believe we are in a position to make a change in Texas and we need your help to get it done. We need your time and energy so we can reach our neighbors at this dire moment in our nation's history. . If you've never volunteered for a campaign, don't worry! We have veteran volunteers ready to train you. Let me hear your story: I want to know from you personally, why you are pledging to vote and the top issues on your mind. I sincerely want to hear from people all over Central Texas. You can simply respond to this email or drop me a Facebook message. Include your first name, your story, and a pic so I can learn about what matters to you. Fourteen weeks to go - let's make this happen! =** If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | ONE TIME CONTRIBUTIONS | MONTHLY CONTRIBUTIONS ---|--- = | = = | = = | = = | = Thank you, and stay safe. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: U.S. Senator Kamala Harris Endorses Nina Ahmad for Pennsylvania Auditor General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | **U.S. Senator Kamala Harris Endorses** **Nina Ahmad for Pennsylvania Auditor General** California Senator and former candidate for President Kamala Harris endorsed Nina Ahmad today. Dr. Ahmad is the Democratic Nominee for Pennsylvania Auditor General. Senator Harris is the first woman of South Asian ancestry to serve in the U.S. Senate. Dr. Ahmad, also of South Asian ancestry, is the first woman and first person of color to be nominated by the Democratic Party for statewide row office in the history of Pennsylvania. If elected, she will be the first person of color to ever serve in a statewide row office. "Nina Ahmad's journey from a war-torn country to the United States, her steadfast determination, her hard work to become a scientist, and her perseverance is a clear demonstration of the many ways that immigrants enrich our nation. Her work on human rights, civil rights, and women's rights are an important part of her tireless leadership and ability to get the job done for the people of Pennsylvania. I am excited to endorse Nina for Auditor General and look forward to working with her whenever possible to better Pennsylvania and our country," said Senator Harris. "I am so proud to be endorsed by this incredible trail blazing woman! I've admired Senator Harris's grit and passion for public service for a long time. She has been at the forefront of so many important battles on behalf of families in California and across the nation. I hope to serve the people of my state as effectively as Senator Harris has served her state and the country." [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/r3sCXdn4mhl8d_Q-mt8GKlSDewqibq4DfHvDERQrKSQ=)

Will you join US Senator Kamala Harris as we turn PA Blue in 2020? Your support will help us to ensure that we will be victorious in November? Will you donate [$25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or $1,000 to help us win this key battleground state? PLEASE DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/r3sCXdn4mhl8d_Q-mt8GKlSDewqibq4DfHvDERQrKSQ=)?

All of us here at Nina for Pennsylvania Auditor General thank you for your continued support of our campaign. Dr. Nina

P.S. Would you consider chipping in a recurring [**_$20.20 donation to our History Maker Fund_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/r3sCXdn4mhl8d_Q-mt8GKlSDewqibq4DfHvDERQrKSQ=) to make sure we can get my message out and grow our base? [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/r3sCXdn4mhl8d_Q-mt8GKlSDewqibq4DfHvDERQrKSQ=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/KDHRFHNaBmOXGAFpxEnQHb3hnS9jL4McIvQ4M5KGYZU=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/bbYLXgglp99o6nhn79HBm0bSKURAGTzTzZ0_sA6oK0c=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/nbuoFi1rfhUEuMuaC_VZUtFErhNyKgC1HtpP_bfUR28=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/GKaiwpl74b_QrGFNqk4QJFa64wE2m9BKApI2UFGxI9U=/2ahq6HodKtfF4jSQJfqQ6QjhM5-NrsSGwRa7hnh4edg=?hl=en)

Did you see Margaret’s message? We have a real chance to flip this seat, protect control of Congress, and ensure the people of the Suncoast are represented by someone who is going to fight for them — not corporate special interests.

Friend —

Did you see Margaret’s message?

We have a real chance to flip this seat, protect control of Congress, and ensure the people of the Suncoast are represented by someone who is going to fight for them — not corporate special interests.

But to do that we need to raise the resources necessary to counter the attacks Vern Buchanan will throw at us and get our message out to voters. Margaret refuses to take money from corporate PACs, because she believes in you and wants to represent you. But that also means we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to power our campaign, which is why we are asking for your help right now before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.

Please, click on this secure link right now to contribute what you can to help us defeat one of the most corrupt members of Congress and help flip this seat from red to blue: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18436245/228604400/1073285021?refcode2=3e077fa0-e3d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emci=13987f9a-e3d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=3e077fa0-e3d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&refcode=072820-es-eom-4-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTA3N2ZhMC1lM2QwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D8OCZrEjZdxwjaAN0pDOV3RXwldJwcrAE2a3-HfUiz4=)**

Shayne Cheshire

subject: Where’s the relief?

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18436876/228614446/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTAxN2IzNC1lNmQwLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J8Y9D7TCqq0Oox4ZtEFP4fIQFjmlQ0lotxrc5OiOqPE=&emci=2b017b34-e6d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2e017b34-e6d0-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Folks, Cindy Hyde-Smith recently dismissed our campaign and concerns raised by Mississippians as “a lot of noise out there.” She claims that the reason she’s not paying attention to Mississippi voters is because her “priority is trying to stabilize this economy” during the coronavirus pandemic. If that’s true, then all I have to say is: _Where’s the relief? _ When this crisis began, Hyde-Smith joined the administration in downplaying the severity of the pandemic, calling it “Democrat scare tactics” and telling Mississippians that the pandemic would be under control “in a couple of weeks.” Not long after that, Hyde-Smith voted to take money out of Mississippi’s unemployed workers and their families’ pockets in the first COVID-19 relief package — and stalled the following relief package for weeks. Meanwhile, Mississippi has become a coronavirus hotspot. We are facing a surge in cases, a stalled economic recovery, skyrocketing unemployment, and a testing crisis. So let’s be clear, folks: Cindy Hyde-Smith is doing NOTHING to stabilize this crisis. In fact, _she and Mitch McConnell are still stalling on passing legislation._ **It’s never been more urgent to give Mississippi new leadership this November. clean_body: | Folks, Cindy Hyde-Smith recently dismissed our campaign and concerns raised by Mississippians as “a lot of noise out there.” She claims that the reason she’s not paying attention to Mississippi voters is because her “priority is trying to stabilize this economy” during the coronavirus pandemic. If that’s true, then all I have to say is: Where’s the relief? When this crisis began, Hyde-Smith joined the administration in downplaying the severity of the pandemic, calling it “Democrat scare tactics” and telling Mississippians that the pandemic would be under control “in a couple of weeks.” Not long after that, Hyde-Smith voted to take money out of Mississippi’s unemployed workers and their families’ pockets in the first COVID-19 relief package — and stalled the following relief package for weeks. Meanwhile, Mississippi has become a coronavirus hotspot. We are facing a surge in cases, a stalled economic recovery, skyrocketing unemployment, and a testing crisis. So let’s be clear, folks: Cindy Hyde-Smith is doing NOTHING to stabilize this crisis. In fact, she and Mitch McConnell are still stalling on passing legislation. It’s never been more urgent to give Mississippi new leadership this November. Rush a grassroots contribution of $10 or whatever you can today to support our campaign before our July fundraising deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = – Mike Espy Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dana=20Barrett?=
subject: Rep. Barry Loudermilk is worse than Donald Trump 😦
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dana Barrett for Congress**
body:
I know it's a bold statement, but Loudermilk is worse than Trump. All you have to do is look at his voting record to see... |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=0d3043d4f8&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | Dear -

I don't know if you realize this, but my opponent, Barry Loudermilk is worse than Donald Trump. That's a bold statement, but here's why I'm saying it. For starters, Loudermilk is doing Trump's bidding. In the 116th Congress [**Rep. Loudermilk voted with Trump 97% of the time**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=9861003bad&e=e25784ff28)– meaning he's voted against Trump **just twice.**
---
| [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=7b287fba67&e=e25784ff28)
---
| That's bad enough - but here are just a few of the reasons Loudermilk is worse:
1. He voted against The CARES Act that provided relief for families and small businesses during the pandemic. Even Donald Trump supported that legislation.
2. He doesn't believe in vaccines - and did not vaccinate his children.
3. He doesn't believe in science and will rarely wear a mask or social distance.
4. He has defended "our heritage" and the importance of confederate monuments but not said a word about systemic racism or police brutality.

The biggest problem is that Loudermilk is going unnoticed. While it's hard to miss who Donald Trump is, Loudermilk flies under the radar. If we don't spread the word, he could get re-elected by Republicans who are mistaking him for a moderate.

Can you chip in today to help us expose Barry Loudermilk for who he really is?
---

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: David Perdue's anti-Semitic ad against me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
It's simply inexcusable. |
---
Friend, I am disgusted -- but I can't say I'm surprised.

My opponent, sitting U.S. Senator David Perdue, ran a digital attack ad that distorted my face to enlarge and extend my nose.
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e210b/5b2c1286/3de3b036/25f1798b/3516810088/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_28_jo_as&amount=5") **I'm Jewish. And this is the oldest, most obvious, least original anti-Semitic trope in history.**

No, Senator Perdue has not apologized to Georgia's Jewish community. Of course he hasn't. He hasn't said a word.

But, friend, ultimately this isn't about Senator Perdue.

It's about a climate of hatred and bigotry that has been deliberately stirred up by Donald Trump since he descended on a golden escalator in his skyscraper to announce his presidential campaign.

> \- When he called Mexican immigrants "rapists."
> \- When he called white supremacists "very fine people."
> \- When he tweeted "White Power" videos.
_And on and on and on._

**Friend, the people of Georgia and this country deserve so much better.**

We deserve leaders who uplift and unite us, who call us to be kind and compassionate, who build a stronger and more just nation defined by our shared values and aspirations.

That's the America I believe in. That's the America we will build when we defeat the likes of David Perdue and Donald Trump on November 3.

**The only remedy is victory. And to win, I need your support.**

**So let's respond to David Perdue's anti-Semitic attack ad by building more unstoppable grassroots energy. He's only stooping to these tactics because I've caught up with him in the polls.[Will you contribute $5 right now?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e210b/5b2c1286/3de3b036/25f1798b/3516810088/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_28_jo_as&amount=5")**

| | [Chip in $5 now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e210b/5b2c1286/3de3b036/25f1798b/3516810088/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_28_jo_as?refcode=em_2020_07_28_jo_as&amount=5")
---
Thank you for standing with me.

With love,

Jon

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: Black Lives Matter vs. the family
body:
Peter,
As all these companies, sports teams, politicians, and so on race to proclaim “Black Lives Matter,” do they really know what the Black Lives Matter organization stands for? Do you?
Let me share with you just one sentence from the “What We Believe” section of their website:
“**We disrupt the Western-prescribed nuclear family structure** requirement by supporting each other as extended families and “villages” that collectively care for one another, especially our children, to the degree that mothers, parents, and children are comfortable.”
This is a direct assault on the foundation of our society and as Christians, we must take this seriously. This is not a fringe group. While they work to dismantle the family structure, they’re receiving millions upon millions of dollars from both individuals and corporate America.
Even as a black American, I know that disagreeing with this movement means I’ll be labeled an extremist. Fine. My faith in God and love for America vastly outweigh the sting of false words.
I joined My Faith Votes as National Spokesperson because an organized resistance is necessary. Someone needs to stand up for biblical values and help to motivate and mobilize the millions of Christians who may think their voice and their vote no longer matters.
**As we recruit and prepare voters for all 100,000 elections across the country this November, we urgently need your ongoing and generous support.**
**Think about it this way -- as the organization at the forefront of this cultural crusade against our values receives an endless supply of money, are you willing to help push back by[making a donation to My Faith Votes for just $25 or $50 or more](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/e200728apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200727apl01&n=1)?**
While everyone is focused on the race for the White House, and we definitely are, not everything that matters happens in Washington, D.C. Just turn on the news for five minutes and you’ll see our cities and local communities are in dire need of real leadership and reform as well.
I know it may feel like we are being overwhelmed, and you’re wondering if we’ll ever get back to some sense of normalcy. I ask myself the same question.
But we’re not bystanders. We are not some captainless boat being tossed around the ocean. We are faithful followers of a loving and powerful God, and we are free, sovereign citizens of the United States of America. Our future will be decided by us. It’s just a matter of how hard we’re willing to push.
**So I ask you to continue fighting alongside me and My Faith Votes by making a donation of whatever you can today. It is appreciated more than you’ll ever know.**
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/e200728apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200727apl01&n=2)
Thank you, and my God bless America.
Sincerely,

Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200727apl01&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200727apl01&n=4).

name: USPS Update
subject: post offices in Georgia (urgent)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Things are not looking good.
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS: U.S. Postal Service on track to go bankrupt by September - unless we take action NOW!**
|
---
The U.S. Postal Service is in crisis, friend.

**Officials warn that without emergency funding, post offices across the country - including in Georgia - will be forced to shutter. And _600,000_ hardworking employees could lose their jobs.**
The Postal Service is one of our nation's oldest, most vital institutions: Millions of Americans depend on it for access to lifesaving medication, Social Security benefits, groceries - and critically, mail-in ballots.
But in the midst of this public health crisis, the Trump administration _refuses_ to take action to save the Postal Service. Instead, they're working as hard as they can to sabotage mail delivery and DESTROY it for good.
That's why we need to speak up IMMEDIATELY and demand Congress save the U.S. Postal Service before it's too late. **We need another 62 concerned Democrats from Georgia to sign our urgent petition by midnight - but time is running out, and we still don't see your name.**
**[Please, friend: Add your name by midnight to DEMAND Congress save the U.S. Postal Service!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Save-the-US-Postal-Service?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-usps%3Fcode%3Djtk400-ja-nd")**

clean_body: Things are not looking good. | | | BREAKING NEWS: U.S. Postal Service on track to go bankrupt by September - unless we take action NOW! | The U.S. Postal Service is in crisis, friend. Officials warn that without emergency funding, post offices across the country - including in Georgia - will be forced to shutter. And 600,000 hardworking employees could lose their jobs. The Postal Service is one of our nation's oldest, most vital institutions: Millions of Americans depend on it for access to lifesaving medication, Social Security benefits, groceries - and critically, mail-in ballots. But in the midst of this public health crisis, the Trump administration refuses to take action to save the Postal Service. Instead, they're working as hard as they can to sabotage mail delivery and DESTROY it for good. That's why we need to speak up IMMEDIATELY and demand Congress save the U.S. Postal Service before it's too late. We need another 62 concerned Democrats from Georgia to sign our urgent petition by midnight - but time is running out, and we still don't see your name. "" | | "" | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. | _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. >
> 2) We’re **building new coalitions** in our rapidly diversifying community, and we’re bringing new voters into our campaign.
>
> 3) **Our campaign is putting TX-22 residents first -- not Washington special interests.** It’s one of the many reasons our campaign is not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money.

body:
We have a battleground race in Indiana that may make the difference in winning back our House majority. Read more >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469554?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

I don’t need to tell you that a lot is riding on the 2020 elections!

We’ve seen what happens under the failed “leadership” of Nancy Pelosi as the Speaker of the House. That’s why one of our highest priorities this year is to WIN the battleground race in the 5th district.

The Democrats know that if they steal this seat, they’ll likely keep their majority in the House.

They even brought in liberals’ favorite senator, Elizabeth “Medicare for All” Warren, to endorse their campaign.

Can we really afford another term of Speaker Pelosi? Can we afford leaders hand-picked by Elizabeth Warren?

No, we cannot.

Thankfully, we have a fantastic conservative candidate running in this race — Victoria Spartz. We’ve already earned some great support from our grassroots team, but we’ll need everyone mobilized to counter the out-of-state Democrat super money machine.

Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can right now to ensure a victory for Victoria this November? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

I want to make sure everyone who contributes during this critical time is recognized, so we’re going to include your name on our official Hoosier Donor Wall. For a limited time, everyone who donates will have a spot and be remembered as a generous benefactor who stepped up against the liberal elitist super donors.
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Can you dig deep to support Victoria and help us win back the House?

Donate $5 for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=5&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $50 for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=50&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $100 for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=100&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate $250 for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=250&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Donate another amount for victory for Victoria! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

I have faith that we can get through these trying times, and that we will emerge even stronger on the other side. But we have to band together to get there and elect a new conservative majority in the House.

Will you help us today, and be remembered for years to come by putting your name on the wall?

Thank you for your support,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
Fire Speaker Pelosi NOW! >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-donorwall-1-072320?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=Put_your_name_on_the_wall_&amount=&mc_cid=4e39ff9757&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We've come a _loooong_ way since this campaign launched last year. MJ has traveled tens of thousands of miles and talked to Texans from every corner of the state (a whole lot in-person and now a whole lot virtually). We've earned donations from over 190 Texas counties and more than 56,000 donors, with an average of just $23 a donation.

MJ came in first place in the primary, and won the biggest runoff in Texas history. Now, we need to carry that momentum all the way through November 3rd to defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate.

**Can we count on your help to finish the team 's checklist and flip the Senate in November?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jessica?=
subject: The comfort of you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=31e83e7a22&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Ten days ago, a supporter named Jessica wrote a letter to Pat stating that Pat running for public office is a sign of hopefulness for her. She titled that email, “The comfort of you.”

Jessica wrote:

_My husband and I first met you at a Pat Chat in the home of a friend when you ran in the midterms against Jackie. I have no idea how hard that was for you or your spouse or your family, staff, etc., but when all was said and done, someone (you) showed up and said enough. Enough of things being off track. Enough of the system that was meant to protect people, being subverted to take advantage of people. Enough. You made me believe not everyone was bent in the political world. Not everyone was bought. You shined, even in defeat.

So here you are again, you and everyone involved on your team, giving it another shot. And once again, you make me believe there is goodness in the world and you are standing up and saying, enough. Let's get more human. Let's operate on behalf of each other.

Thank you for doing that. For being so decent. It feels like a rare commodity in the political world these days. And then you throw in COVID-19, and all bets are off.

I wanted to send some communication to you stating the simple fact that your decency has buoyed me for a long time. Mostly I just want to say thank you, Pat, for the bright light you are in the world._
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friend, Ten days ago, a supporter named Jessica wrote a letter to Pat stating that Pat running for public office is a sign of hopefulness for her. She titled that email, “The comfort of you.” Jessica wrote: My husband and I first met you at a Pat Chat in the home of a friend when you ran in the midterms against Jackie. I have no idea how hard that was for you or your spouse or your family, staff, etc., but when all was said and done, someone (you) showed up and said enough. Enough of things being off track. Enough of the system that was meant to protect people, being subverted to take advantage of people. Enough. You made me believe not everyone was bent in the political world. Not everyone was bought. You shined, even in defeat. So here you are again, you and everyone involved on your team, giving it another shot. And once again, you make me believe there is goodness in the world and you are standing up and saying, enough. Let's get more human. Let's operate on behalf of each other. Thank you for doing that. For being so decent. It feels like a rare commodity in the political world these days. And then you throw in COVID-19, and all bets are off. I wanted to send some communication to you stating the simple fact that your decency has buoyed me for a long time. Mostly I just want to say thank you, Pat, for the bright light you are in the world. | "THANK PAT WITH A $10 CONTRIBUTION →" | "THANK PAT WITH SOMETHING ELSE →" | If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically. name: Barack Obama
subject: I'm humbly asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I hope you feel the urgency of this moment as much as I do. |
---
[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd61/2110537371/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020-headercountdown?refcode=julyheadercountdowntest&amount=25")
[](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2") Peter,

When I joined Joe for a virtual grassroots fundraiser last month, I said, "_whatever you 've done so far is not enough._"

I meant it, Peter. And I'm being forthright in calling on all of us to do more, and getting our friends and neighbors in Pennsylvania to do more, because I believe in the power of people who care about our future -- and that includes you.

We're living through incredible challenges. And Republicans aren't up to the job. Their failure has cost lives and livelihoods on an unprecedented scale.

But as I've said before, when times get tough, we don't give up. **We get up**. And that's why it's so important that each and every one of us does more and more with every passing day to elect Joe as our next president. There's nobody I would have rather had by my side during my presidency. And now we've got to have his back as he wages a battle for the soul of America.

Peter, Joe's team is setting an ambitious $8 million July end-of-month fundraising goal. This is an important moment to take your commitment to this campaign to the next level because an investment of even $5 made in Joe Biden today will pay off for generations to come.

[**So I 'm humbly asking you, Peter, will you do just a little bit more today and pitch in that $5 to help Joe Biden win the most important election of our lifetime?**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| [$100 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&amount=100&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&express_lane=true")

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2")
---
I hope you feel the urgency of this moment as much as I do, Peter.

And I hope that you never discount the power that your actions can have to move this country forward. I know you've heard me say it before, but you can change the world.

So join me, and let's send Joe back to the White House to build the America that we dream about for our children. **Pitch in what you can to his campaign today here:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Obama-End-of-Month**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2")

Thank you,

Barack Obama

P.S. Remember when wearing a tan suit was the biggest controversy of the week? I wish it were the same today. (And I still maintain that suit looked good.) But if we elect Joe Biden, I know we can restore trust in our government, and transform this country for the better. [**Please donate what you can today to help him win.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020obama?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.28_B1_BHOv1_X__F1_S2_C2__full_T2")
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd59/2110537371/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd58/2110537371/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd57/2110537371/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd56/2110537371/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd55/2110537371/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd54/2110537371/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd53/2110537371/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd52/2110537371/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd51/2110537371/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd50/2110537371/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd53/2110537371/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd4f/2110537371/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd52/2110537371/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b953/1cd0ac28/176ea13d0/357dfd4e/2110537371/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: MondaireforCongress.com
subject: We’re short of our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
It’s been over a month since our decisive victory on June 23rd, and now that we are the certified winner of the Democratic Primary, we need to win the general election against our far-right Republican opponent. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w56cQ-QIZ8GdUFU1lvvgzaqRsSs-t3nS1iz7RVyv4zjR4MHZjcDbCTIZAF8rfFyLW8e4E9mAu5AV-35ZAHPszP1oOrMqisPODmpwpm21C929ySzSQJ8D06YKoh469yEIG1LqL_lNEOFkmKoxaOFS2bM2vEX_wWGdKZvNz_DZqrdJhAx5mEYjrHBGB9ro8EmItHZco-qTjmi7a-i6P2F09h0QQ6xJxjrdk5q7P4mp34Y0RJPMgjegrkndyulLBm1T73yIVezEsz4Md5aQ7grDOc7bg2DbBSq-rM-gokOifdKA/33u/2J3zZIBeTS6YDs0QphCX6A/h0/2DwuPuvF8Q3_GQT5Ma12HmKFA0o89hBUdCN0KRWxVr8)
Friend,
It’s been over a month since our decisive victory on June 23rd, and now that we're the certified winner of the Democratic Primary, we need to win the general election against our far-right Republican opponent.
Throughout this campaign, we’ve built a grassroots movement powered by thousands of supporters who knew, well before June 23rd, that Mondaire is the best candidate to represent New York’s 17th Congressional District.
We made it across the finish line on June 23rd because of supporters like you. Even though Mondaire has been busy engaging with community leaders and speaking with local and national media about his policy proposals for the new Congress, we can’t afford to stop fundraising. **_[In fact, we’re still $17,238 away from where we need to be by the end of July. Can you chip in today to help?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w56cQ-QIZ8GdUFU1lvvgzaqRsSs-t3nS1iz7RVyv4zjW_PCLYdBrzrCnZrJew4zUwFSO2vJ_QnDbjXMcElDpAl6Le4fuDzAuDO8BTkJt0Ebvp7kvNf4p7HXijlbyXb6M8LKQ8kCypXBngV5BhXZYkbkiZxXgyORj-ym1taW01267ca1HfCuF2X19oCsIfijD2c3YwOon6NWGb9Wy72JDFoBVixvMwXd4q4BkUAeMUhazERm6X1IZP3r7_Hn8NJQ8s9dLdI5IcJWZuwoWSJTpJPSiTffPKALKSGOAL4xRS3DA/33u/2J3zZIBeTS6YDs0QphCX6A/h1/dmcXUSMEsU-yU7VOxRsbLC_kqFfFD9j998fi4PSNp48)_**
This is our first fundraising deadline since the primary, and we need to end the month strong. We must continue to raise money to send mail to an even larger universe of voters, run TV and digital ads, and phone bank.
Friend, we can’t let a Trump Republican win this seat. We also need to send a strong message to the Republican Party that this seat will remain Democratic for many years to come. **_[Can you donate today to ensure our victory?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w56cQ-QIZ8GdUFU1lvvgzaqRsSs-t3nS1iz7RVyv4zjUkgy1S3A43SoyFj-Ldg5ZbRV1mTYeDQ3E9roUO0bJxnUNmMy8jpNQhBmAcodey-hbpRKUyISO4OMfigMWk8lNo9e03Ve2nc6A8IA9RiU4MVhzziXrau3qkaFF-0Zfr452npRVi97yo2AeMucCWOi7j7GBCE_EeRCb0tR_M8vs0QzCBhrIvKcnlcplqW_VubHrKsge0SrMjEq457bHgK4T4Z7gAogmYpwg3qczIELhyO-uq-jF0tvYmssfDDuAtO4g/33u/2J3zZIBeTS6YDs0QphCX6A/h2/VKMzuNrsarihBevgeZX_9AG51W15DleJDGHMpTe4-3c)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w56cQ-QIZ8GdUFU1lvvgzaqRsSs-t3nS1iz7RVyv4zjcm8nQahD54hJd4Ecac3cBw8HLLGv6BreWIQpsWkaZYFILtn-MUuL0rSTfjmpffSok3LE9ziM_5o0yRF86Cziytc3-RQMAXOphQnXXhxFSdFBttI4kq_5BZ4Pti03CPTHKfuik6YU4P2VFRAxoiBjCESA48F1qlZy1Wt6I0oXL6x2p4Gr35dVd4u0HOSCVcEtEGPggcsuXXhxW2OwZboYLVZ-8TBInrvBrcJ_drn8xNiw4H6ggZKYUZa9sbbyQC8WA/33u/2J3zZIBeTS6YDs0QphCX6A/h3/ovEPzEHW2L29yc8inRTUcejLTOOb5iTBEEYDoqTIikc)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Moderna, Pfizer Coronavirus Vaccines Begin Final-Stage Testing
body:
The start of the vaccine trial is the latest sign that the most advanced coronavirus vaccine candidates are moving into the final stages of testing | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a8b2368c0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Moderna, Pfizer Coronavirus Vaccines Begin Final-Stage Testing**

“Two of the most advanced experimental coronavirus vaccines entered the pivotal phase of their studies on Monday,” Peter Loftus and Jared S. Hopkins report for _The Wall Street Journal_. “The start of the pivotal Moderna vaccine trial is the latest sign that the most advanced coronavirus vaccine candidates are moving into the final stages of testing, and could be ready for wider use before year’s end if results are positive.”

President Trump visited a biotechnology plant in North Carolina yesterday, where he praised the rapid progress toward a vaccine being made under Operation Warp Speed.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e5b34c1f3&e=3ee4985eea)

**WATCH** : [**“We’ve shaved years off” time it takes to develop a vaccine**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ff9232ebe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “It doesn’t get more heartbreaking—soul-wrenching—than the funeral of tiny Davell Gardner, the youngest victim of New York City’s crime spike . . . And [criminals] now believe—alas, with good reason—that the [New York City] police and the rest of the law-enforcement system are helpless to stop them,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b7520cfec&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| The critics have it “100 percent wrong”—the Department of Homeland Security’s actions in Portland “should just be the first step in disrupting the organized violence aimed at intimidating public officials, injuring law enforcement officers, destroying public and private property and making our streets less safe,” James Jay Carafano writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef2de26e08&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| Ivanka Trump joined Interior Secretary David Bernhardt to visit “Duluth Pack, a Minnesota manufacturer that pivoted from leather and canvas products to [personal protective equipment] during the coronavirus pandemic, as part of her Pledge to America's Workers that focuses on job training,” Evie Fordham writes for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d41a5b356e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5dfd015044&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=68879efb59&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=70ea2caa8b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
---
| | [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0387/72412298/4ba49890/61064964/412422358/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXRfanVseSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNzI4X0dpZGVvblN1cnJfVTJfWDIiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyMCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split_july?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2") Peter -- My campaign just clinched the Maine Senate Democratic nomination -- _and now it 's me and Susan Collins on the ballot in November._ **It 's no secret: National Republicans are worried about this race.** They're already attacking us. They've built up a multi-million dollar war chest to protect Susan Collins' seat. _**To be victorious on Election Day -- we must do the same.**_ _We 're going to need every single Democrat on board if we're going to defeat Senator Collins. _That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter. **My campaign has a goal to get 15,000 donations in before midnight to show the power of our grassroots support across the country.** [**Will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before midnight so we have the resources to build the campaign we need to win?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0387/72412298/4ba49890/61064967/412422358/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXRfanVseSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNzI4X0dpZGVvblN1cnJfVTJfWDIiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyMCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split_july?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+a+split+donation+betwee&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0387/72412298/4ba49890/61064966/412422358/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJnaWRlb25fc3BsaXRfanVseSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNzI4X0dpZGVvblN1cnJfVTJfWDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon_split_july?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200728_GideonSurr_U2_X2")

clean_body: | | "" Peter -- My campaign just clinched the Maine Senate Democratic nomination -- and now it 's me and Susan Collins on the ballot in November. It 's no secret: National Republicans are worried about this race. They're already attacking us. They've built up a multi-million dollar war chest to protect Susan Collins' seat. To be victorious on Election Day -- we must do the same. We 're going to need every single Democrat on board if we're going to defeat Senator Collins. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Peter. My campaign has a goal to get 15,000 donations in before midnight to show the power of our grassroots support across the country. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" "" Recent polling has my campaign up by 4 points! We have a lot of momentum on the ground here in Maine -- we know defeating Collins is in reach. But, we need you on the team to keep it up and make sure that Democratic voters make it to the polls. Peter -- I'm counting on you. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" We'd love to have you on the team! **End of Month Fundraising Deadline**
**Goal: $50,000.00**
_*A money bomb is a way to give an additional donation of the same amount automatically on a future date.**This means you will be charged for a donation equal to the one you make today on July 31st to start our 3rd Month with the budget needed to fight Donna Shalala and the Democrat Machine***_
Peter, when I decided to take on Shalala a year ago, my decision was fueled by not only my love for Miami, but for a profound passion for faithfully serving the people of Miami and this beautiful country.

**But I can’t do that without your generous support.** With your help, I will be one step closer to reaching our _**END OF MONTH**_ goal and my mission of faithfully serving the people South Florida.

**[Will you help me continue this fight?](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=aafdd7eb8a264b5e9a161f3b19d7d747&_e=mCI10Pb6b5cbGeVgP9PwfVNo0xLnCvvlE4Fu0cds8jqChfxiCtb4TnPeEc6XXUQeG6gsTthL_AbPG2uVNbQwceWVitkQyc0rHj_uhD57vVJhdi97MXXPuyX_mN9JIAHNvHWWXcfaHEO2yDN76ZVs-YZ-ikR9NUO1dassUJjDF0R2O1m3pmMVkMiRzHj0d-XX_egn463p12v7uznEbfcZJ-5fRLV10OlrI1Y5ryotkuoIYDDa3Zfg6uVAX4RPC38F4CkvGgENfFvxCsVe8w4hqUkcq6_1hBQlztZIgNiPu3qv-cEf0ECkUqsA9hRtIbleQJ-ELDmiPY9XUuSOxzeHpFTxlbMZZTO3hCo0VJNQ_mn6WNtkUtz19H_VRxc21cvJ0Adlymku2tetFJScKlblbBsFz3BmXFhmthAwQNWlG3s%3D)**

Thank you,
Maria Elvira Salazar
We know that Americans all across the country are going through a challenging time and many are struggling to make ends meet as a result of the coronavirus outbreak. Please only contribute if you are able to, and if you would like to stop receiving fundraising emails for the time being, **[please follow this link](http://links.mariaelvirasalazar.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=aafdd7eb8a264b5e9a161f3b19d7d747&_e=mCI10Pb6b5cbGeVgP9PwfVNo0xLnCvvlE4Fu0cds8jpdwZqDc3-VnFL6V4mWY0KX1Nmkjk1To6uB8ZMm30jc1h2zrwUGXFvZDWjpw0TBwnVKvjCihm6QqLo8J8MbOrQT-Filmm_1x3SSHNjvvwOhcNje8gZIHs_uUxR2_U_bOuXLC5zcaSyDTPP0cIs6AiUJlm-HtTBIvSPWPNZii6QSZOLcJl47AYGvfAhVD6AnuKRhZFFCZhJ3q_-f7IfYu6E21UFMIf6kKfIRBdCNy11S8c8AiAcSFgGeN1P31pRfjTNxUrihyCkyDOSlksCS7hwJ12xX4o7bTsURIfv8zObo-Jlw-xCpLmLGtEEfjoAo_6St9ZLrkioagFFx7brfI7DNWTM1J4_qWQL61DvONN6ezlC5wRKPDIwC3kSH6dEFQ5g%3D)**.

Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.I'm a new Text block ready for your content.

If we miss this goal, we'll have to scale back some of our outreach plans f | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525019/45c30650/1cdfedbec/66e86588/2595001792/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**[If you're able to support Warren Democrats as a grassroots donor, here are three reasons why it would make a big difference right now.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525019/45c30650/1cdfedbec/66e8658b/2595001792/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDIyRl9FT1FfR1JNX1RfMjAyMDA3MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT22F_EOQ_GRM_T_20200728_V1S1_P")**
1. We only have until Friday's end-of-month deadline to hit our July fundraising goal. And we're not quite where we need to be. If we miss this goal, we'll have to scale back some of our outreach plans for the critical final months before the election.

2. You'll help build grassroots organizing power to elect Democrats like Elizabeth up and down the ballot and across the country.

3. At a time when Republicans are rewarding their corporate donors instead of putting people first, you'll help make sure Elizabeth can keep fighting against corruption and for a government that works for everyone.

[So what do you say? If it makes sense for you right now, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to hit this goal by Friday's deadline.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525019/45c30650/1cdfedbec/66e8658b/2595001792/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDIyRl9FT1FfR1JNX1RfMjAyMDA3MjhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT22F_EOQ_GRM_T_20200728_V1S1_P")

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

[_**Can we count on you to chip in today and help us hit our $15,000 online fundraising goal before the end of the month?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18443149/228732262/-561621748?refcode=HIC_20200728_em_fr_eom2_all_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQxMTc1ZS0xMGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17o7Wn6BEm194EYkDOdSvT8o5M9tIycF_qc_Cwrx2Tc=) Thanks for all your support, Josh \----------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: Team Hicks
Date: July 27, 2020
Subject: July fundraising goal: $15,000 before July 31 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18443150/228732263/-561621748?refcode=HIC_20200728_em_fr_eom2_all_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQxMTc1ZS0xMGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17o7Wn6BEm194EYkDOdSvT8o5M9tIycF_qc_Cwrx2Tc=) Dear friends, We’re now just under 100 days until the November election, and we’re working hard over here at Team Hicks to connect with more voters and build the organization we need to win in November. _**[Will you chip in $28 or more today to support our voter turnout operation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18443151/228732264/-561621748?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200728_em_fr_eom2_all_l3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQxMTc1ZS0xMGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17o7Wn6BEm194EYkDOdSvT8o5M9tIycF_qc_Cwrx2Tc=)**_ We’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 before July 31, and we’re doing it by running a grassroots, people-powered campaign. Since Day One, Josh has refused corporate PAC donations — he’s running the type of campaign folks across the Commonwealth can be proud of. Last month, our average online donation was just $28, and we closed the fundraising gap with our opponent (who received hundreds of thousands of dollars in PAC money). _**[Will you chip in our average gift of $28 to help us turn out voters and flip this district on November 3rd?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18443152/228732265/1219571724?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200728_em_fr_eom2_all_l4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQxMTc1ZS0xMGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17o7Wn6BEm194EYkDOdSvT8o5M9tIycF_qc_Cwrx2Tc=)**_ We’re heading into the final stages of this campaign, so every bit of support we receive will help us turn out more voters in November.**_[So, if you’re able, chip in whatever you can before midnight on July 31.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18443153/228732266/1219571724?amount=28&refcode=HIC_20200728_em_fr_eom2_all_l5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQxMTc1ZS0xMGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17o7Wn6BEm194EYkDOdSvT8o5M9tIycF_qc_Cwrx2Tc=)_** We hope we can count on your support ahead of this historic election. | | [**Yes, count me in ➞**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18443154/228732267/-561621748?refcode=HIC_20200728_em_fr_eom2_all_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTQxMTc1ZS0xMGQxLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=17o7Wn6BEm194EYkDOdSvT8o5M9tIycF_qc_Cwrx2Tc=)

Team Hicks

Josh Hicks for Congress

United States

Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.

He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Friend,

Our country is at a fork in the road.

The options we have at the ballot box this year couldn’t possibly be any different from each other, and with just **98 days** until we cast our votes, it's critical we understand exactly what’s on the line in this election.

_Here’s the Left’s agenda – and the Right’s vision – for 2020 and beyond:_
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=8ca22edb08094d8eb84d62d698f1e889&_e=z231zOMSKnVaiVeoILPRtpIM7kV94q3l-VyFxELRYhzFgVI5g4KCgLRBfrVOsjOEMjcPgoo9oIawzVmSCty_5ygp5x0uYKwjoW-mgPghy_8Q2DgOCfoSK0-TctICEu_9jB-zVWCGpDHSocL6pLVlMOzc0tZrPD-ddbWCw9ycFIDYrzm0pp4AfQEyBvnIfH9YBZYEYVGnpQth-ielF-WhNoiXfD0MhmIrUN8spzPGXJ6QzponEveG7j1DGaA4saDcXk5HJJ4qWGBHQQZGWV9AUzbXj0NXXoF5rNmVNq2WHb9sxEigUQLiXl6eP3WwSjeMBSH_ZhgWz6OSbYm1EQUBcrUGS9wyXjH3cos2nXPYdGTdbCvXXAjS04owONsaLy1AWU-IAivCHQxe9xG-aVb4d4ZJGL5sdPvLQy01A64x7BsaWaBNz6PDpTnGKT1NQEt3kuX4xGOi8yjnwuObMmY81cHtfL9SSfeYu-8p1cgtupI%3D)

Their agenda isn’t your typical collection of Washington policy proposals.

**It’s the most radical, dangerous, and backward collection of ideas ever seen in the history of American politics, and we must take a stand to stop them before it’s too late.**

We have less than 100 days left to win this fight – but with our campaign’s next fundraising deadline coming up at **midnight on July 31st** , I need your support now more than ever before.
