name: Bill Olson
subject: TREASON
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

I just wish someone would restore sanity to America! These vicious rioters in Portland, Chicago, Seattle and other liberal cities are not just causing havoc.

They are trying to take away your very freedoms, our American freedoms, and up until now.... they are succeeding.

Remember how the Fascistic the "Anti-Fascist", or Antifa, terrorist movement became? They refuse to allow free speech or debate, and are intimidating Americans from speaking their mind:

Self-censorship is on the rise according to a new Cato Institute survey that reports nearly two-thirds of Americans are afraid to share their political views.

A new CATO Institute/YouGov national survey found 62% of Americans say the political climate today prevents them from saying what they believe. This is up several points from 2017 when 58% of Americans said they were afraid to share their political beliefs.

“31% of liberals, 30% of moderates and 34% of conservatives are worried their political views could get them fired or harm their career trajectory,” the CATO survey stated.

The time has come to stop the Left's "Cancel Culture", and restore the First Amendment so Americans can be Americans again!

A recent poll conducted by Politico found that a plurality of Americans believe cancel culture has gone too far. (RELATED: Poll: Large Plurality of Americans Say Cancel Culture Has Gone Too Far)

“There have been shifts across the board, where more people among all political groups feel they are walking on eggshells,” the CATO survey found, adding, “majorities of Democrats (52%), independents (59%) and Republicans (77%) who all agree they have political opinions they are afraid to share.”

“Strong liberals stand out, however, as the only political group who feel they can express themselves. Nearly 6 in 10 (58%) of staunch liberals feel they can say what they believe,” the CATO survey found.

This problem isn't limited to Portland or Seattle. They won't just attack combatants- they have attacked the elderly and innocent and anyone they just didn't like the look of!

Unless we stop these nutty Stalinist bigots now, this will be the future of every American city.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

Stalinist thugs terrorizing normal Americans. Where does it end?

This Maoist dystopia is Seattle, today; and it will be America, tomorrow- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

Thank God President Trump is sending Federal Law Enforcement into these crazy liberal cities to put down these Antifa terrorists. There must be law and order!

This garbage isn't legal, it isn't Constitutional, and is hard-line Communism- this isn't the America ANY of us know! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms against the radical Socialists!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA
Florida is crucial for the Republicans. It's now the President's home state, with many swing districts like mine that we can flip!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=iP438H4WyF6OuRU&b=4GnSBqqiF1Hgt6ePF8YkWA
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat Socialist Darren Soto and stop America from becoming Seattle!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!
